# Celo PayGrid

> Celo PayGrid is an MCP-based payment execution layer for AI agents on Celo Mainnet with automatic USDC, USDT and USDm swap-enabled settlement.

## Core resources

- Agent landing: https://web.celopaygrid.xyz
- MCP endpoint: https://mcp.celopaygrid.xyz/mcp
- Agent metadata: https://mcp.celopaygrid.xyz/.well-known/paygrid-agent.json
- Documentation overview: https://web.celopaygrid.xyz/docs/overview.html
- Technical architecture: https://web.celopaygrid.xyz/docs/technical-architecture.html
- MCP reference: https://web.celopaygrid.xyz/docs/mcp-reference.html
- Security model: https://web.celopaygrid.xyz/docs/security-model.html
- Raw markdown docs are also available under /docs/*.md

## Key facts

- Product name: Celo PayGrid
- Network: Celo Mainnet
- Chain ID: 42220
- Interface: Remote MCP
- Discovery tool: get_agent_capabilities
- Core use cases: payment request generation, stablecoin swap quotes, transaction verification and agent-to-human payment workflows
- ERC-8004 Agent ID: 9497
- Self Protocol Agent ID: 172
- Self agent address: 0xEf3481bcDd48Db5FFdaF77A39F5f64BaDC957316
- PaygridLink contract: 0x31Aa9Ba23e4CAC3f41d88fb1C904067c0b3dda89
- PaygridRouterV2 contract: 0x8d290c97100f0e87e04Efd1a790F27004fA3f08B
- Mento Router: 0x4861840C2EfB2b98312B0aE34d86fD73E8f9B6f6
- Swap tools: quote_payment_request, pay_payment_request
